description_long: This is a two-seater wooden chaise with a robust, dark brown frame and vertical slat detailing on the backrest and sides. The seat and back are generously padded with light gray, textured cushions, providing a soft and inviting appearance. There are five cushions in total: two large backrest cushions, one wide seat cushion, and three smaller accent cushions arranged in front. The armrests are flat, wide, and extend the full depth of the seat, matching the frame's wood finish. The legs are straight and sturdy, integrated seamlessly with the frame for stability. This piece is well-suited for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments such as parks, patios, or communal seating areas.
description: A sturdy wooden two-seater chaise with light gray, textured cushions and vertical slat detailing, featuring wide armrests and a set of five cushions for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of cushions, the wide seat, and the vertical slat armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cushions, the thickness of the armrest, and the straight leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical slat backrest and the wooden frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and cushion depth from the other side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and straight, constructed from dark brown wood with evenly spaced vertical slats. It is topped with two large, loose, light gray cushions that provide a soft and inviting surface.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, flat and wide, made of matching dark brown wood and extending the full depth of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, square, and made of the same dark brown wood as the frame, providing a sturdy and stable base without decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a visible, slightly textured weave, giving it a subtle, tactile appearance without any printed patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are five cushions: two large backrest cushions, one wide seat cushion, and three smaller accent cushions arranged in front, all loose and easily rearrangeable for comfort.
